note: Generated guardrail library, not authority — authority is per-run consolidation records (.okra/runs/<run-id>/memory/). Candidate-only until a current run ratifies an entry into its frame.

anti_goals.applies_when: any pumped-fn code is produced (src, examples, tests); pumped-lite-lint wired as a package script
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: example 11 tests green before and after reaching 0 diagnostics

anti_goals.threshold: 1 end-to-end run, exit 0, expected output observed, before acceptance
anti_goals.applies_when: anything labeled runnable or production-ready ships an entrypoint
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: main.ts ran green after fix; suites unaffected

anti_goals.applies_when: production entrypoints/composition roots; demo data enters via real input boundaries (stdin/files/queues) from fixtures/
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: NDJSON intake replaced embedded demo; 11 tests green

anti_goals.applies_when: pumped-fn app/example code; grep for Scope/ExecutionContext/handle-typed params outside composition roots; root privilege = create scope, exec flows, dispose
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: conversions net-negative LOC, suites green both rounds
anti_goals.ratification: user-caught twice (glue re-hid in main.ts once)

anti_goals.applies_when: flows composing flows — deps-declared handles (exec/execStream), never closure imports; a missing API for the idiom is a core-gap finding (FlowHandle.execStream precedent), not an excuse
anti_goals.invalidates_when: covered by lint_diagnostics if that is ratified

anti_goals.threshold: 1 per path where a stream carries must-not-drop work
source_refs: lite README Async Iteration conflation rule
anti_goals.applies_when: consumers of conflating channels (resolveStream/changes) touch work items; test = N pushes mid-consumption, each item lands exactly once
anti_goals.does_not_apply_when: genuinely conflatable feeds (state views, tickers, heartbeats)
anti_goals.invalidates_when: core gains a lossless buffered stream mode
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: gated burst test passes; prior architecture demonstrably dropped batches
anti_goals.ratification: orchestrator-caught (orchestrator specced the lossy pattern itself)

anti_goals.applies_when: all tests: no hand-rolled type gymnastics (use expectTypeOf — it evaluates its argument), no never-executed scaffolding, for await over manual iterator driving unless the assertion is about protocol timing, succinct names
anti_goals.does_not_apply_when: timing-sensitive assertions needing pending next() control
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: rewrites kept every invariant, suites green

anti_goals.threshold: frame style walls list source, tests, type-param naming, boundary rules explicitly
source_refs: retrospective: 4 post-green style catches all outside A4 as written
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: later packets with enumerated surfaces produced clean output first pass

anti_goals.threshold: 1 explicit false-positive pass per rejection heuristic before acceptance
source_refs: F3 narrowed twice: orchestrator .next catch + review-2 AsyncGenerator ruling
anti_goals.applies_when: walls implemented as runtime rejection heuristics

anti_goals.threshold: every LOC ceiling paired with one compression round (sweep + apply, revert-dont-weaken) before acceptance
source_refs: PKR-6 (-81) + DKR-3/PKR-7 (-18) after user pushed too-much-code twice under a held 400 ceiling
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: -99 total with zero behavior change, all tests unmodified

anti_goals.applies_when: all pumped-fn identifiers: no type suffixes on definition handles (store not storeAtom), prefix-free type params (Output/Input/Fault/Yield, never TOutput), files/factories named for the policy not the mechanism (latest.ts not conflating-iterator.ts), no jargon where a plain word carries the meaning; count = identifiers violating lib style at acceptance
anti_goals.does_not_apply_when: a bare name would shadow an existing type in scope (TagExecutor Value-not-Tag precedent)
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: T-prefix strip and latest rename were pure renames, 180+ tests green, no .d.ts structural change
anti_goals.ratification: user-caught twice (conflatingIterator naming, T-prefixes), user-requested as wall 2026-07-05

anti_goals.applies_when: pumped-fn app/example code: every business feature (state mutation, orchestration, effectful operation, boundary validation) is a flow or resource; state queries are derived atoms/selects; boundary parsing lives in flow parse; free functions are ONLY pure calculations over plain values; count = helpers receiving ctx/scope/handles/atom-state-for-mutation, plus reducer/query grab-bag modules (a file named domain/utils/helpers holding state transformers is the smell)
anti_goals.does_not_apply_when: pure policy over plain values (parsers, templates, date math); third-party port contracts that take ctx at the factory call site (sdk model.complete)
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: PKR-9: domain.ts deleted, queue/ledger split, reducers inlined, net -37 LOC, lint 0, 11+181 tests green, entrypoint runs
anti_goals.ratification: user-stated rule 2026-07-05 (third occurrence of the pattern: runIngest(scope), main.ts glue, domain.ts reducers)

anti_goals.applies_when: any controller state mutation: no get()+set() read-modify-write, ever — single atomic update(fn) including drains (capture inside the updater) and check-then-act guards (decide inside the updater); interleaving regression test required for drain/queue patterns
anti_goals.does_not_apply_when: read-only get() with no subsequent set
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: PKR-11: 3 RMW sites converted, drain-race test proves interleaved enqueue survives, 12+181 green
anti_goals.ratification: orchestrator-confirmed defect after user pushed for harder review 2026-07-05

anti_goals.threshold: full line-by-line diff read per worker acceptance; gates (lint/tests/entrypoint) are necessary, never sufficient
source_refs: registerCron survived 5 gate-green acceptances; get/set race survived 4 incl. its own burst test
anti_goals.applies_when: every worker diff, example/app code included, regardless of loop fatigue or round count
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: the round that reinstated full review found 2 defects + 5 discipline breaks the gates had passed

anti_goals.applies_when: all node factories: ctx is a receiver, never a call argument or literal-embedded value; ctx-taking third-party contracts are wrapped via bound() in deps, which curries the per-invocation ctx (FlowHandle precedent). Enforcement: pumped/no-ctx-argument at error level
anti_goals.does_not_apply_when: receiver usage (ctx.exec/ctx.input/ctx.changes); lite/sdk internals implementing the binding machinery itself
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: PKR-12b: bound() shipped with per-invocation rebinding test, lint rule live, example migrated; 186 lite + 42 lint + 12 example green, lint 0
anti_goals.ratification: user-ratified rule + mechanism 2026-07-05; earlier resource-wrapper approach rejected for ctx misattribution (would capture owning ctx, not per-invocation ctx)

anti_goals.applies_when: expressions where a call's argument is itself a nontrivial call result (result-of-that-as-param-of-this, awaits inside argument positions): name the intermediate steps — pipelines read top-to-bottom and diff line-per-step. The no-single-use-variable rule bans `const x = f(); return x` ceremony, NOT named pipeline steps
anti_goals.does_not_apply_when: single-hop wrapping (f(g(x)) where both are trivial), idiomatic array method chains (filter/map), zod schema builders
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: classify + reviewCount unnested, 12 tests + lint 0 unchanged
anti_goals.ratification: user-caught 2026-07-05: no human saves a line of code by sacrificing readability; diff noise

anti_goals.threshold: merge command issued only AFTER checks read green, as a separate invocation — never compounded with the check
source_refs: PR 313 merged red: gh pr checks && gh pr merge in one compound command; no branch protection caught it
anti_goals.applies_when: any PR merge; also: local gates must include the repo's own CI commands (pnpm -r typecheck, lint:check, -r test), not only touched packages
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: PR 314 merged green after verified checks

anti_goals.threshold: flow factories start synchronously within the dispatch tick when parse is sync/absent; regression tests pin it
source_refs: parking-lot-spa browser hang; bisected to PKR-6 compression; fixed 36f24e2a
anti_goals.applies_when: any refactor touching exec/invocation paths — implicit timing contracts (sync start, event ordering) must be named and tested before compression passes; UI frameworks depend on them invisibly
anti_goals.invalidates_when: the contract is deliberately renegotiated with downstream consumers
anti_goals.no_regression_evidence: 2 sync-start regression tests, spa browser test green, full workspace sweep green
anti_goals.ratification: found via CI browser test + commit bisection 2026-07-05
